name: Maria Santos
about: 7 years in ultra-luxury at Hermès and Chanel Madison Avenue. Bilingual Spanish adds value with international clientele. Retailers describe her as the definition of polished professionalism.
interviewTranscript: I've worked at Nordstrom for over two years—it was great selling there. Not only did I get retail experience, but I got actual sales experience, so I knew what it was like to need to sell in order to make money. I could see how important it was for the business. I've worked at clothing stores, I've been the store opener. When someone was going out of town and needed something for the entire family, instead of having them look alone, I would help them through the store and through every piece of the process. A lot of people appreciated that approach.
